title: TestLoginResult
description: Result of a dry-run SSO Test Login. Resolves the identity, roles, teams and domain outcome a candidate security configuration would produce for a real login, WITHOUT creating a user, issuing any token, or starting a session.

domainCheck.description: Outcome of applying the authorizer domain rules to the resolved identity.

resolvedDomain.description: Domain extracted from the resolved email/principal.

passed.description: Whether the resolved identity satisfies the domain rules.

status.description: Overall outcome of the test login.

stage.description: Furthest stage reached: TOKEN_VALIDATED (token failed validation), CLAIMS_EXTRACTED (identity could not be resolved from claims), or DOMAIN_CHECKED (identity resolved and domain rules applied).

resolvedPrincipal.description: Username/principal that would be used for the login.

resolvedEmail.description: Email that would be associated with the login.

mappedRoles.description: Roles that would be assigned from the provider claims.

mappedTeams.description: Teams that would be derived from the team claim mapping.

errors.description: Human-readable failure reasons (only present when status is 'failed').
